sql_array: CREATE TABLE example_table (id UInt32, bitmap_col AggregateFunction(bitmapBuild, UInt32));
INSERT INTO example_table VALUES (1, bitmapBuild([1, 2, 3])), (2, bitmapBuild([2, 3, 4]));
UPDATE example_table SET bitmap_col = bitmapUnion(bitmap_col, bitmapBuild([3, 5])) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, bitmapHasAny(bitmap_col, bitmapBuild([3, 6])) AS has_intersection FROM example_table;
SELECT id, bitmapHasAny(bitmapBuild([4, 5]), bitmap_col) AS has_intersection FROM example_table WHERE id = 2;
